name: Change of Control Analysis
description: Identify consent and notice requirements triggered by change of control or change in ownership events.

columns.name: Consent Required (Change of Control)
columns.prompt: Does this agreement require consent, approval, or waiver from the customer specifically upon a change of control or change in ownership of the service provider? Answer YES, NO, or NOT_ADDRESSED. Provide the section reference and page number.

columns.name: Consent Clause Summary
columns.prompt: If this agreement requires consent upon a change of control, summarize the relevant clause in 1-3 sentences. Include the exact section reference and page number. If no consent clause exists, state NOT_ADDRESSED.

columns.name: Notice Required (Change of Control)
columns.prompt: Does this agreement require the service provider to notify the customer upon a change of control or change in ownership? Answer YES, NO, or NOT_ADDRESSED. Provide the section reference and page number.

columns.name: Notice Clause Summary
columns.prompt: If this agreement requires notice upon a change of control, summarize the relevant clause in 1-3 sentences. Include the exact section reference and page number. If no notice clause exists, state NOT_ADDRESSED.
